In 2025, she successfully completed her first overseas concerts in Shanghai and Beijing, continuing to shine with an ever-evolving and expressive presence on stage. Now, in 2026, Momoko Kikuchi brings the enchanting world of “Peachful Days Extra” to Taipei—inviting fans to revisit the vibrant colors and pure melodies of a golden musical era.

events.description: From TikTok to the global stage, Stella Jang’s musical journey is a testament to her undeniable talent. You may have heard her song “Colors” featured in countless short-form videos—the track sparked the global “Color Challenge” and introduced her clear, uniquely recognizable voice to audiences around the world. Yet behind that familiar sound lies an artist of far greater depth and artistry. This May, Stella Jang will make her long-awaited debut in Taiwan.
